overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban waterfront plaza during golden hour. The player moves from an open waterfront promenade past distinctive tiered architecture, through a bustling pedestrian plaza with a reflective water feature, and finally into a covered commercial tunnel.

events.description: camera turns left away from waterfront railing toward the plaza interior

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade then turning left into the open plaza area

entered.detail: metal railing along the water's edge with concrete base
distinctive multi-tiered building with green metallic facade and horizontal lines
tall palm trees scattered throughout the plaza area
tall white modern building with grid windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins along a waterfront promenade with a metal railing overlooking the water. The camera turns left into a wide open plaza dominated by a distinctive green tiered building on the right and a white office building on the left. Palm trees are scattered throughout the space, and the golden hour sun casts long shadows across the paved tiles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with commercial storefronts

events.description: encountering a woman taking a photograph with a camera in the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza passing various pedestrians and a woman taking photos

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow top and pink skirt taking a photo with a camera, then drinking from a bottle

entered.detail: large orange billboard with advertisement visible on the left side of the plaza
small colorful food vendor stall with green and yellow coloring

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the open plaza, the camera passes a woman taking photographs and drinking from a bottle. The white office building looms larger on the left while a large billboard comes into view. The plaza is moderately populated with pedestrians walking in various directions, and the green tiered building remains visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with reflective water feature approaching tunnel

events.description: approaching and walking alongside the rectangular reflective water pool

agents.ego_description: walking toward and around the reflective water feature in the center of the plaza

entered.detail: rectangular shallow pool with reflective water surface showing building reflections
covered underpass entrance with orange trim and large advertisement screens
large white billboard with 'nicola' text and heart logo at tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a rectangular reflective water pool in the plaza center, showing mirror-like reflections of the surrounding architecture. The tunnel entrance becomes visible ahead, flanked by large advertisements including one for 'Nicola'. Pedestrians continue to walk through the space as the camera moves past the water feature toward the underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with commercial advertisements

events.description: entering the covered tunnel, transitioning from natural sunlight to artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered tunnel underpass, passing other pedestrians and vending machines

notable_agents.action: man in white tank top walking ahead into the tunnel

entered.detail: dark concrete ceiling with exposed beams and artificial lighting fixtures
large advertisement poster for 'JINGUJI' brand on the right wall
illuminated digital screen mounted on the tunnel ceiling showing video content
red and blue vending machine with glowing lights on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered tunnel underpass, transitioning from bright natural sunlight to dimmer artificial lighting. Large advertisements for 'Nicola' and 'Jinguji' line the walls, while a digital screen hangs from the ceiling. The space becomes enclosed with concrete walls and ceiling, and vending machines appear on the right side as the camera moves deeper into the tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched waterfront promenade into the enclosed artificial light of a commercial underpass. It begins along a metal railing overlooking the water before turning left into a wide open plaza where a green tiered building and a white office tower cast long golden hour shadows across the pavement. As the camera moves deeper into the space, it passes scattered palm trees and pedestrians, including a woman taking photographs, while a large billboard comes into view. The scene then shifts toward a rectangular reflective water pool that mirrors the surrounding architecture, leading the camera past advertisements for Nicola toward a dark tunnel entrance. Finally, the environment transitions from bright natural sunlight to a dim, enclosed corridor lined with concrete walls, digital screens, and vending machines.
